Retrieve  from DB. Decrypt file bytes using AES-256 key from settings.

Few things I need clarification: 1. Services. There are Dedup Service, Storage Service and Encryption Service. Which service handles Upload and Download. Can there be a Search/Analytics service which does quota/storage computation and search?
1. Can this services be easily extracted and scaled independently if we need to extend their features?
2. E2E test is at Step 13 and Documentation is at Step 14.  Can we bring them forward to after Step 1, so I can consistently track our progress by the passing and failing tests.
